$comment: This file was generated by Nango (v0.69.43)

files.description: Array of file IDs to sync directly

folders.description: Array of folder IDs to sync recursively

file_id.description: The ID of the file to copy. Example: "123abc"

name.description: The new name for the copied file. If not provided, the original name is used.

destination_folder_id.description: The ID of the folder where the copy should be placed. If not provided, the copy is placed in the same folder as the original.

id.description: The ID of the copied file

name.description: The name of the copied file

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the copied file

created_at.description: The creation time of the copied file (RFC 3339)

file_id.description: The ID of the file to comment on. Example: "1zpWYuzY5S65OUGNBZQXmJf4FZnIWLJHBkC2xBamBzvw"

content.description: The plain text content of the comment. Example: "This is a test comment."

anchor.description: A region of the document represented as a JSON string for anchored comments. Example: "{\"r\":\"revision_id\",\"a\":[{\"line\":{\"end\":\"1\"}}]}"

content.description: The plain text content of the comment.

created_time.description: The time when the comment was created (RFC 3339 date-time).

modified_time.description: The time when the comment was last modified (RFC 3339 date-time).

email_address.description: The email address of the author.

resolved.description: Whether the comment has been resolved.

deleted.description: Whether the comment has been deleted.

name.description: The name of the new folder. Example: "My New Folder"

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent folder where the new folder will be created. If omitted, the folder is created in the root of the drive. Example: "1BxiMVs0XRA5nFMdKvBdBZjgmUUqptlbs74OgvE2upms"

id.description: The unique identifier of the created folder.

name.description: The name of the created folder.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the folder (always application/vnd.google-apps.folder).

created_at.description: The timestamp when the folder was created.

name.description: The name of the shared drive. Example: "Project Resources"

file_id.description: The ID of the file containing the comment. Example: "1oD5i7NbLYQ6_mzEjNIXSqFvKXvvRNETwkfLrlDooFV0"

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to delete. Example: "AAAB1rDkxSA"

file_id.description: The ID of the file from which the comment was deleted

comment_id.description: The ID of the deleted comment

file_id.description: The ID of the file or folder to delete. Example: "1aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ123456"

success.description: Whether the file was successfully deleted

file_id.description: The ID of the deleted file
The ID of the file to delete the permission from. Example: "1xJTXyJ1Pm1rK3Y9J1Y9J1Y9J1Y9J1Y9J"

permission_id.description: The ID of the permission to delete. Example: "12345678901234567890"

drive_id.description: The ID of the shared drive to delete. Example: "0AP4r1ZoX57FvUk9PVA"

query.description: Search query string. Uses Google Drive search query syntax. Example: "name contains 'report'" or "mimeType = 'application/pdf'". If not provided, returns all files.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor (nextPageToken) from previous response. Omit for first page.

page_size.description: Maximum number of files to return per page. Default is 100.

next_cursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page. Null if no more results.

total_results.description: Total number of files returned in this page

name.description: Folder name or search query to find folders by name. Example: "Test Folder Alpha"

start_page_token.description: The starting page token for listing future changes

file_id.description: The ID of the file containing the comment. Example: "1abc123xyz"

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to retrieve. Example: "AAAB1p01B9w"

file_id.description: The ID of the file. Example: "1xABCDEF123456"

permission_id.description: The ID of the permission. Example: "12345678901234567890"

type.description: The type of the grantee. Valid values are user, group, domain, or anyone.

role.description: The role granted by this permission. Valid values are owner, organizer, fileOrganizer, writer, commenter, or reader.

email_address.description: The email address of the user or group this permission refers to.

domain.description: The domain to which this permission refers.

allow_file_discovery.description: Whether the permission allows the file to be discovered through search.

display_name.description: A displayable name for users, groups or domains.

photo_link.description: A link to the profile photo, if available.

expiration_time.description: The time at which this permission will expire (RFC 3339 date-time).

permission_details.description: Details of the permission, including specific permissions and whether they inherited from a parent.

deleted.description: Whether this permission has been deleted.

pending_owner.description: Whether the account associated with this permission has been deleted.

view.description: Indicates the view for this permission.

created_time.description: The time at which this permission was created (RFC 3339 date-time).

file_id.description: The ID of the file. Example: "1abc123xyz"

revision_id.description: The ID of the revision. Example: "1"

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the revision.

modifiedTime.description: The last time the revision was modified in RFC 3339 format.

keepForever.description: Whether this revision is marked as keep forever.

publishedLink.description: A link to the published revision.

publishedOutsideDomain.description: Whether this revision is published outside the domain.

size.description: The size of the revision in bytes.

originalFilename.description: The original filename of the revision.

md5Checksum.description: The MD5 checksum of the revision.

id.description: The ID of the shared drive to retrieve. Example: "0ACo-2dj5Ql07Uk9PVA"

drive_id.description: The ID of the shared drive to hide. Example: "0ABC123xyz"

page_token.description: The token for continuing a previous list request. Omit for first request, in which case the action will get a start page token automatically.

drive_id.description: The shared drive ID. If specified, changes will be limited to this drive.

include_items_from_all_drives.description: Whether to include changes from all shared drives. Default: false

include_removed.description: Whether to include changes indicating items have been removed. Default: true

page_size.description: Maximum number of changes to return per page. Default: 100

file_id.description: The ID of the file to list comments for. Example: "1wwU5Dhr-6_3SHgtSQnXJ7HBPkgW-shalzdc0pfRL-Yk"

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response. Omit for first page.

next_cursor.description: The cursor for the next page of comments. Null if there are no more pages.

folder_id.description: Folder ID to list contents. Omit for root folder.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor (pageToken) from previous response. Omit for first page.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. Default: 100.

include_shared_drives.description: Include items from shared drives. Default: false.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for next page. Null if no more pages.

total_count.description: Total number of files in this page.

file_id.description: The ID of the file to list permissions for. Example: "1AoQyTafvg1p_cqzJTTGmdbMTQ6jolnJ7J_mQBlPcFec"

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response. Omit for first page.

page_size.description: Maximum number of permissions to return per page (1-100). Default: 100

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response. Omit for first page.

limit.description: Maximum number of shared drives to return. Default is 10, maximum is 100.

query.description: Query string for searching shared drives. Example: "hidden = false"

next_cursor.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results. Null if this is the last page.

file_id.description: The ID of the file to move. Example: "1mD3ukEAmRqo8u0RF_Cr6IJl9f_uWTYH03vesDhB5Svw"

from_folder_id.description: The ID of the current parent folder. Example: "1SpnQKJHqNDh-qhbj_zGD2aIm-G-RKC_k"

to_folder_id.description: The ID of the destination folder. Example: "1Bl1rB7hkBbdzmKUka3zSj0bhAK3pGypD"

drive_id.description: The ID of the shared drive to unhide. Example: "0ABC123xyz"

file_id.description: The ID of the file containing the comment. Example: "1mlzflxHXQkoCj-3p1T_O762TNAfGGr_iIb5C9uwnIwk"

comment_id.description: The ID of the comment to update. Example: "AAAB1pvq854"

content.description: The new plain text content of the comment. Example: "Updated comment text"

resolved.description: Whether the comment is resolved. Optional.

file_id.description: The ID of the file or shared drive.

role.description: The new role for the permission.

drive_id.description: The ID of the shared drive to update. Example: "0AN1234567890XYZ"

name.description: The new name for the shared drive. Example: "Updated Shared Drive"

color_rgb.description: The color of the shared drive as an RGB hex string. Example: "#0000FF"

copy_requires_writer_permission.description: Whether the copy operation requires writer permission

domain_users_only.description: Whether only domain users can access the shared drive

drive_members_only.description: Whether only drive members can access the shared drive

restrictions.description: Restrictions to apply to the shared drive

name.description: The name of the file to create. Example: "document.txt"

content.description: The file content as plain text or base64 encoded string

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the file. Example: "text/plain", "application/pdf"

is_base64.description: Whether the content is base64 encoded. Defaults to false

folder_id.description: The ID of the folder to upload the file into. If not provided, defaults to root. Example: "1a2b3c4d5e6f7g8h"

id.description: The ID of the created file

name.description: The name of the created file

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the file

web_view_link.description: A link for opening the file in a relevant Google editor or viewer

web_content_link.description: A link for downloading the content of the file in a browser
